sources.title: Flipping (Full Movie) Crime l Drama
sources.description:
Five gangsters working for a man named Leo soon discover they could get more if they ran the streets themselves. Tensions build and loyalty is tested as they plan a hit that could change all of their lives forever.

Directed by Gene Mitchell 
1996
Starring David Amos, David Proval, Keith David, Gene Mitchell       

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: The story of Michael Moore, Shot, Hooker, Joey, and Dennis. Five gangsters who work for a man named Leo. They soon discover they could get more out of life if they could run the streets themselves. Tensions build and loyalty is tested as they plan a hit that could change all of their lives forever.
metadata.Actors: David Amos, David Proval, Gene Mitchell
